import re, unicodedata, math, statistics, numpy as np

# Build normalization
arabic_diacritics = re.compile(r"[\u064b-\u0652\u0670\u0653-\u065f\u06d6-\u06ed]")
tatweel = re.compile(r"[\u0640]")
punc = re.compile(r"[\u061F\u060C\u061B،؛؟…\"'«»\(\)\[\]\{\}\-–—\-:;.,!ـ*]+")
def normalize_ar(s):
    s = str(s)
    # unify hamza forms?
    s = arabic_diacritics.sub("", s)
    s = tatweel.sub("", s)
    # Convert different Hamza/alef forms to bare alef?
    s = s.replace("أ", "ا").replace("إ", "ا").replace("آ", "ا").replace("ٱ", "ا")
    s = s.replace("ى", "ي").replace("ؤ","و").replace("ئ","ي").replace("ة", "ه")
    s = punc.sub(" ", s)
    s = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", s)
    return s.strip().lower()

# normalize Quran data
q_norm = []
for item in qdata:
    q_norm.append({
        **item,
        "ayah_text_norm": normalize_ar(item["ayah_text"])
    })
# Let's search for tokens
target_full = "وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا الْإِنسَانَ مِنْ نُطْفَةٍ أَمْشَاجٍ نَبْتَلِيهِ فَجَعَلْنَاهُ سَمِيعًا بَصِيرًا * وَلَقَدْ هَدَيْنَاهُ السَّبِيلَ إِمَّا شَاكِرًا وَإِمَّا كَفُورًا"
target_snippet = "وَلَقَدْ خ...ا كَفُورًا"
t_full_norm = normalize_ar(target_full.replace("*", " "))
t_snip_norm = normalize_ar(target_snippet.replace("...", ""))
t_full_norm, t_snip_norm[:100]

len(hits2), [(h["surah_id"], h["ayah_id"], h["ayah_text"]) for h in hits2[:5]]
